hero.title: Celebrating Love, Your Way
hero.subtitle: Unique and personalized wedding ceremonies in the Prosecco hills and beyond.

about.title: My Story
about.bio1: Hello, I am Noemi Bressan! I am a celebrant based in Valdobbiadene, in the heart of the beautiful Prosecco hills in Italy. I specialize in creating deeply personal wedding ceremonies for couples from all over the world.
about.bio2: Passionate about love and storytelling, I firmly believe that every couple deserves a ceremony as unique as their love story. Empathy, availability, flexibility, and a few useful tips to make that day truly perfect are my priorities.
about.languagesDesc: Language should never be a barrier to love. I am a native Italian speaker with degrees in English and German. I also speak Spanish fluently, allowing me to craft and deliver your perfect ceremony in multiple languages.

wedding.title: Wedding Ceremonies
wedding.desc: Shared design of the ceremony. From symbolic to official legal rites, I convey the emotion of your stories and life journey. Fully customizable texts and rituals in any of the languages I speak.

other.title: Other Services
other.d1: I organize events and guided tours through the stunning Prosecco Hills and Treviso.
other.d2: Host for book presentations, or corporate and formal events.

addons.title: Optional Add-ons
addons.desc: Location scouting, direct contact with witnesses, willingness to travel out of region/country. I can provide contacts for excellent professionals like sound engineers, DJs, and jazz bands.

step1.title: Booking Request
step1.desc: The first step is to check if I am available for your wedding using the dedicated form. I will schedule a pre-reservation and send all information within one day.

step2.title: Let's Get in Touch!
step2.desc: We will arrange an obligation-free video call to see if I'm the right person for you. Once decided, we confirm the booking with a deposit. I will also guide you through legal requirements.

step3.title: The Preparation
step3.desc: My mission is to provide the best experience. We will define readings, vows, and rituals together so that everything is a meaningful reflection of you both.

step4.title: The Ceremony
step4.desc: It's your big day! I will be there at least 45 minutes prior. I will handle every aspect from the moment the march starts until the signing of the certificate.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Can you perform legally binding weddings?
faq.a1: Yes! I am available to perform both symbolic ceremonies and official civil ceremonies with a delegation.
faq.a2: Absolutely. I am available to travel outside the Veneto region and outside of Italy.
faq.q3: Do you provide an audio system?
faq.a3: I can help by providing contacts for professional microphone/audio systems and extra music.

reviews.name: Giulia & Marco
reviews.text: Noemi made our day unforgettable. She wrote a ceremony that truly spoke about us, moving all our guests. Her sweetness is unparalleled.

reviews.name: Sarah & Tom
reviews.text: We met Noemi and instantly clicked. She delivered our entire ceremony flawlessly in both Italian and English. Our international guests felt completely involved!

reviews.name: Elena & Roberto
reviews.text: A fantastic experience. She helped us prepare everything, from documents to vows, calmly and professionally. Highly recommended!
